response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates 19 years of engineering breadth and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, this specialized AI Strategy role requires deep ML/AI expertise and director-level strategic leadership. The candidate lacks a relevant advanced degree, no demonstrated AI products or platforms, and no evidence of strategic advisory responsibilities at director level. The role's focus on AI differentiation and innovation requires expertise the candidate does not yet possess.
strengths: 19 years of diverse engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded systems, and infrastructure
Currently engaged with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq, showing recent AI exposure
Proven founder of GISCollective (9+ years) and open-source leadership demonstrating entrepreneurial capability
concerns: AI/ML expertise limited to recent months; lacks advanced degree, research, or foundational ML background
No demonstrated AI products, platforms, or machine learning project track record in portfolio
No evidence of director-level strategic decision-making, customer advisory, or thought leadership in cloud/AI domains

key_factors.factor: Director-level strategic leadership and advisory experience
